profile.name: Sidarth G
profile.summary: I started with HTML and JavaScript, moved across modern frontend stacks, and then focused deeply on backend architecture. I now build reliable product systems across APIs, infra, and developer workflows, while continuing to learn DevOps and networking.

highlights: Manage office IT infrastructure and networking with Cloudflare tunnels, Intune-managed devices, and BitLocker policies.
Maintain CI/CD pipelines using Docker and Kubernetes clusters deployed on globally distributed Proxmox servers.
Build scalable backend systems with REST, WebSockets, gRPC, and background workers for agent tasks and cleanup jobs.
Set up OpenAPI-based contract workflows that generate TypeScript clients and reduce backend/frontend integration overhead.
Collaborate on feature planning with documentation-first workflows and archived technical design decisions.
Built micro-SaaS marketing tools that increased traffic to the main platform by 20%.
Owned delivery lifecycle from UI design and database modeling to deployment, migrations, and reliability.
Helped establish a revamp foundation with OpenAPI clients, Turborepo micro-app architecture, and shared UI setup.
Reduced operational cost by replacing expensive Webflow forms with full-stack embedded forms and stronger validations.
Developed practical foundations in TypeScript, CSS, middleware, REST APIs, Angular, and Express.
Contributed to SAP Fiori analytics workflows to improve internal visibility for operational teams.
Improved data quality by removing redundant testing data and supporting debugging-heavy workflows.
Implemented a proof-of-concept rule engine with a multi-step form experience.

certifications: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Specialization
